path: 05 Projects/2025-2026 Railway-X/TP2 - Use Case - TP 3.2.1 Traceability/Railway Fire Protection/SMT Railway Fire Protection/HARTING SDoCs Railway Fire Protection/SDoC preLink cabling system DIN EN 45545-2.02.pdf
text: 0.114 HARTING Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (in accordance with ISO/IEC 17050-1) Issuer's name: HARTING Electronics GmbH Issuer's address: Marienwerderstralle 3 32339 Espelkamp Germany Product Series Product: preLink® cabling system Part No: see Attachment A The products named in the attachment are in conformity with the requirements of: DIN EN 45545-2:2013 Railway applications - Fire protection on railway vehicles - Part 2: Requirements for fire behaviour of materials and components and DIN EN 45545-2:2016 Railway applications - Fire protection on railway vehicles - Part 2: Requirements for fire behaviour of materials and components The products fulfill the requirement sets R26 for the hazard levels HL1 to HL 3.1 According to clause 4.3.1 of the standards, products with a combustible mass < log are not considered, if they are in the delivery state not in touching with other unclassified products. 1The Grouping Rules given in clause 4.3 of DIN EN 45545-2 have been applied. Thus up to 100 g of unclassified material may be used if Rules 1 to 3 are fulfilled and the exposed area of each product is < 0,2 m2. Rule 1: If the total combustible mass of grouped products is < 100 g for interior products or < 400 g for exterior products no requirements apply to the products of this group. Rule 2: If the combustible mass of the grouped products exceeds the limits stated in Rule 1, but is < 500 g for interior grouped products or < 2000 g for exterior grouped products the products of this group have to be tested against R24 until the remaining mass of unclassified products is below the mass as given in Rule 1. Then Rule 1 is applied. R24 requires test of oxygen index according to EN ISO 4589-2. Rule 3: If the combustible mass of the grouped products exceeds the limits stated in Rule 2, products of the group have to fulfill R22 for interior products and R23 for exterior products until the remaining mass of unclassified products is below the limits given in Rule 2. Then Rule 2 is applied. Espelkamp, 2024-01-11 Joachim Finke Head of Product Managment Network Interface Connectors Espelkamp, 2024-01-11 Frank Welzel Director Global Product Management The given information reflects our current knowledge. It is based on statements and information of our suppliers and third parties. This declaration does not include guarantees of quality or durability. Topicality, completeness and accuracy of the content are subject to change without notice. The safety instructions are to be respected. The user is self -responsible for the evaluation of the information and the concrete measures derived from it. Besides that, HARTING is liable only for culpable, intentional or grossly negligent acting as long as no mandatory legal liability for damages of life, body, health or Product Liability Act exists.
